arts.ttl: Roma Ready to Quickly Rebuff PSG Advances for Koné
arts.sum: Manu Koné is having a respectable maiden Serie A campaign, and Roma plot to resist the temptation of turning a quick profit on him. His valuation has quickly doubled, and a few teams, in particular PSG, are keeping tabs on him. The post Roma Ready to Quickly Rebuff PSG Advances for Koné appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.sum: Arsenal and Paris Saint-Germain will head into the first leg next Tuesday with draws. However, one Gunner notes that the squad expects a different performance against the Parisians. On Tuesday, the capital club had a one-goal lead thanks to a goal from Vitinha. arts.ttl: Can Kiwior and Trossard deliver for Arsenal ahead of crucial PSG clash?
arts.sum: Ahead of a crucial semifinal tie against PSG in the Champions League, Arsenal will need several players to step it up to avoid the same mistakes.

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta unsure if Mikel Merino will be fit enough for PSG game
arts.sum: Liverpool need to secure only a draw against Tottenham at Anfield on Sunday to be crowned Premier League champions.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Unwilling to Pay €58M for PSG Target as Chelsea Take Transfer Lead
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain were interested in Dean Huijsen last summer as part of a wider push to reinforce their defense, but the Spanish center-back ended up joining AFC Bournemouth instead. If they decide to circle back, they’ll have plenty of company. arts.ttl: Juventus Ready to Make Bold Decision on €55M-Rated Standout Wanted by Barcelona, PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain’s decision to move on from Randal Kolo Muani has opened the door for the club to go after a new No. 9 to pair with Gonçalo Ramos this summer. One name reportedly on their shortlist is Juventus striker Dusan Vlahovic. According to CaughtOffside, PSG began monitoring the Serbian forward’s situation last month.
